prompt: Add chart data transformation utilities for the analytics dashboard

turns.content:
<task>
Add chart data transformation utilities for the analytics dashboard
</task>

arguments.summary: Read analytics types: DataPoint with date/value/category and ChartData with labels and datasets. Need to add transformation utilities.

next_steps.description: Create src/analytics/transforms.ts with groupByCategory() that takes DataPoint[] and returns ChartData with one dataset per category
Add aggregateByDate() that sums values per unique date, and run tsc

arguments.summary: Created transforms.ts with groupByCategory (pivots data into ChartData format with one dataset per category) and aggregateByDate (sums values per date). TypeScript compiles cleanly.
arguments.final_answer:
Created src/analytics/transforms.ts:
- groupByCategory(): pivots DataPoint[] into ChartData with labels=dates, one dataset per category
- aggregateByDate(): sums values per unique date, returns sorted array
- TypeScript compiles cleanly
